     The Numbers Business Report

Marry Me (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $22,438,180Details
International Box Office $26,336,813
Worldwide Box Office $48,774,993
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $519,029
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $588,190
Total $1,107,219
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Kat Valdez is half of the sexiest celebrity power couple on Earth with hot new music supernova Bastian. As Kat and Bastian’s inescapable hit single, “Marry Me,” climbs the charts, they are about to be wed before an audience of their fans in a ceremony that will streamed across multiple platforms. But, on learning her on-stage partner has been having an affair behind her back, Kat decides to marry a stranger, math teacher Charlie Gilbert, who is holding a “Marry Me” sign by accident at her live concert.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$7,949,980 (35.4% of total gross)
Legs:2.82 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:46.0% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$23,000,000 (worldwide box office is 2.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,642 opening theaters/3,643 max. theaters, 3.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $25,485,337

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 11th, 2022 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: February 9th, 2022 (Wide) (Switzerland)
February 9th, 2022 (Wide) (France)
February 10th, 2022 (Wide), released as Vezmi si ma (Slovakia)
February 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Croatia)
February 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Uruguay)
Video Release: February 11th, 2022 by Peacock
MPA Rating: PG-13 for brief strong language and some suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2640 (Cert #52824), 7/29/2020)
PG-13 for some language and suggestive material.
(Rating bulletin 2644 (Cert #52824), 8/26/2020)
Running Time: 112 minutes
Filming location (country): United States
Plot point: Cross-Culture Romance, Divorcée Romance, Infidelity, Relationships Gone Wrong, Romance, Singers, Single Parent
Social setting: Music Industry
Subgenre: Romantic Comedy
Source:Based on Comic/Graphic Novel
Genre:Romantic Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Nuyorican, Perfect World Pictures, Kung Fu Monkey Productions, Belle Hope Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
